title: Remove EVP ecdsa.rs and clean up cfg gates
description: After ecdsa_native.rs is complete: (1) delete wolfcrypt/src/ecdsa.rs, (2) change lib.rs to always use ecdsa_native.rs (drop wolfssl_openssl_extra condition and not(wolfssl_openssl_extra) condition), (3) update P-521 re-export gate to remove wolfssl_openssl_extra, (4) update conformance test cfg guards in ecdsa.rs and wycheproof_ecdsa.rs.
